changeSet.author: analyze-logs
changeSet.sql: CREATE TABLE static_ua ( ua_name TEXT NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY, ua_group TEXT NOT NULL, ua_label TEXT NOT NULL )

changeSet.author: analyze-logs
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO static_ua (ua_name, ua_group, ua_label) VALUES ('ClaudeBot', 'AI Bots', 'ClaudeBot'), ('Claude-SearchBot', 'AI Bots', 'Claude-SearchBot'), ('OAI-SearchBot', 'AI Bots', 'OAI-SearchBot'), ('PerplexityBot', 'AI Bots', 'PerplexityBot')

changeSet.author: analyze-logs
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO static_ua (ua_name, ua_group, ua_label) VALUES ('Unknown', 'Browsers', 'Unknown'), ('Chrome / iPhone', 'Browsers', 'Chrome / iPhone'), ('Chrome / iPad', 'Browsers', 'Chrome / iPad'), ('Chrome / Android', 'Browsers', 'Chrome / Android'), ('Chrome / Windows', 'Browsers', 'Chrome / Windows'), ('Chrome / macOS', 'Browsers', 'Chrome / macOS'), ('Chrome / Linux', 'Browsers', 'Chrome / Linux'), ('Chrome / Unknown OS', 'Browsers', 'Chrome / Unknown OS'), ('Firefox / iPhone', 'Browsers', 'Firefox / iPhone'), ('Firefox / iPad', 'Browsers', 'Firefox / iPad'), ('Firefox / Android', 'Browsers', 'Firefox / Android'), ('Firefox / Windows', 'Browsers', 'Firefox / Windows'), ('Firefox / macOS', 'Browsers', 'Firefox / macOS'), ('Firefox / Linux', 'Browsers', 'Firefox / Linux'), ('Firefox / Unknown OS', 'Browsers', 'Firefox / Unknown OS'), ('Safari / iPhone', 'Browsers', 'Safari / iPhone'), ('Safari / iPad', 'Browsers', 'Safari / iPad'), ('Safari / Android', 'Browsers', 'Safari / Android'), ('Safari / Windows', 'Browsers', 'Safari / Windows'), ('Safari / macOS', 'Browsers', 'Safari / macOS'), ('Safari / Linux', 'Browsers', 'Safari / Linux'), ('Safari / Unknown OS', 'Browsers', 'Safari / Unknown OS'), ('Edge / iPhone', 'Browsers', 'Edge / iPhone'), ('Edge / iPad', 'Browsers', 'Edge / iPad'), ('Edge / Android', 'Browsers', 'Edge / Android'), ('Edge / Windows', 'Browsers', 'Edge / Windows'), ('Edge / macOS', 'Browsers', 'Edge / macOS'), ('Edge / Linux', 'Browsers', 'Edge / Linux'), ('Edge / Unknown OS', 'Browsers', 'Edge / Unknown OS')

changeSet.author: analyze-logs
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO static_ua (ua_name, ua_group, ua_label) VALUES ('Mastodon', 'Fediverse', 'Mastodon'), ('Misskey', 'Fediverse', 'Misskey')

changeSet.author: analyze-logs
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO static_ua (ua_name, ua_group, ua_label) VALUES ('Feedly', 'Feed Readers', 'Feedly'), ('Feedbin', 'Feed Readers', 'Feedbin'), ('Reeder', 'Feed Readers', 'Reeder'), ('FreshRSS', 'Feed Readers', 'FreshRSS'), ('NewsBlur', 'Feed Readers', 'NewsBlur'), ('rss-parser', 'Feed Readers', 'rss-parser'), ('sfFeedReader', 'Feed Readers', 'sfFeedReader'), ('Feeder', 'Feed Readers', 'Feeder'), ('Flus', 'Feed Readers', 'Flus'), ('WP.com FeedBot','Feed Readers', 'WP.com FeedBot'), ('Inoreader', 'Feed Readers', 'Inoreader')

changeSet.author: analyze-logs
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO static_ua (ua_name, ua_group, ua_label) VALUES ('Googlebot', 'Search Bots', 'Googlebot'), ('Google ImageProxy', 'Search Bots', 'Google ImageProxy'), ('Google FeedFetcher', 'Search Bots', 'Google FeedFetcher'), ('Bingbot', 'Search Bots', 'Bingbot'), ('YandexBot', 'Search Bots', 'YandexBot'), ('Baiduspider', 'Search Bots', 'Baiduspider'), ('DuckDuckBot', 'Search Bots', 'DuckDuckBot'), ('Qwantbot', 'Search Bots', 'Qwantbot')

changeSet.author: analyze-logs
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO static_ua (ua_name, ua_group, ua_label) VALUES ('AhrefsBot', 'Other Bots', 'AhrefsBot'), ('SemrushBot', 'Other Bots', 'SemrushBot'), ('SERankingBot', 'Other Bots', 'SERankingBot'), ('Barkrowler', 'Other Bots', 'Barkrowler'), ('DotBot', 'Other Bots', 'DotBot'), ('MJ12bot', 'Other Bots', 'MJ12bot'), ('HeadlineBot', 'Other Bots', 'HeadlineBot'), ('PetalBot', 'Other Bots', 'PetalBot'), ('CocCocBot', 'Other Bots', 'CocCocBot'), ('SeznamBot', 'Other Bots', 'SeznamBot'), ('SummalyBot', 'Other Bots', 'SummalyBot'), ('Yumechi Proxy', 'Other Bots', 'Yumechi Proxy'), ('WellKnownBot', 'Other Bots', 'WellKnownBot'), ('Censys Scanner', 'Other Bots', 'Censys Scanner'), ('Palo Alto Scanner', 'Other Bots', 'Palo Alto Scanner'), ('VisionHeight Scanner', 'Other Bots', 'VisionHeight Scanner'), ('2ip Scanner', 'Other Bots', '2ip Scanner'), ('HeadlessChrome', 'Other Bots', 'HeadlessChrome')

changeSet.author: analyze-logs
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO static_ua (ua_name, ua_group, ua_label) VALUES ('Obsidian', 'Apps', 'Obsidian'), ('Google Search App', 'Apps', 'Google Search App'), ('okhttp', 'Apps', 'okhttp'), ('Go HTTP client', 'Apps', 'Go HTTP client')

changeSet.author: analyze-logs
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO static_ua (ua_name, ua_group, ua_label) VALUES ('Facebook', 'Other', 'Facebook')
